Grâce à des analyses claires et des clés de compréhension, ce programme permet de mieux saisir les enjeux politiques, économiques et sociaux qui marquent le monde contemporain et d'en suivre les évolutions principales.

programme.title: Info Intox[Live]
programme.desc: Comment être certain que ce qui est partagé sur les réseaux sociaux n'est pas une intox ? Guide pratique sur les réflexes à avoir pour décoder une info et éviter les pièges.

programme.desc: Join Georja Calvin-Smith for all the news from Africa and the Maghreb, together with France 24's correspondents and guests of the show. Eye on Africa is on every week day twice a day. Get to know how global affairs influence its top events and be the first to experience its colorful exotic culture.

programme.desc: Bluey teaches Bingo how to use magic so she can make Mum play with her, but she forgets to explain the most important rule: never use magic for cheekiness.

programme.desc: Bella and Lift play with a stick that makes the perfect magic wand. They visit Patch, who has a tasty recipe - sticky stick critters!

programme.title: E6 - Canada
programme.desc: Canada, where summer is short and time is tight – any time is the right time to fight. The mighty North provides the setting for bison, bald eagles, and polar bears to wage some of the most heavy-duty fighting in the animal kingdom.

programme.title: E1 - Ghosts of Cederberg
programme.desc: A rocky landscape, carved over eons by wind, water and fire, these are the Cederberg Mountains of South Africa. These imposing peaks are home to an incredible diversity of plants and animals. But there are some here that remain unseen, lurking in the shadows and ready to strike at any time...

programme.title: E1 - The Outcasts
programme.desc: In the Luangwa Valley lies a grove of Ebony trees, home to a troop of baboons. But, there are dangers here – the resident leopard who, unlike the other predators, is powerful and agile enough to climb trees. He’s not an easy foe to elude.

programme.title: E2 - Living on the Edge
programme.desc: The plains and woodlands of the Luangwa Valley are the wildest and most merciless of all neighborhoods where duels between predator and prey are played out both day and night. For the animals that call this home, it’s a daily battle to stay alive.

programme.title: E2 - Seasonal
programme.desc: Watch the seasons wax and wane and learn how trees and animals help one another survive. Witness spring fireflies dancing after dark, discover summer fungi that cool off overheated trees, and prep for autumn migrations as the leaves begin to fall.

programme.title: E1 - Ghosts of Cederberg

programme.title: E4 - Flight Path
programme.desc: Plot a course for adventure as animals go on remarkable journeys through the skies. Navigate a wooden labyrinth with a speedy goshawk, join a sandgrouse’s trek to a distant watering hole, and see a murmuration of starlings mesmerize their nemesis.

programme.desc: Come to a playtime party with Mia and her friends! Roll and bounce with Twinkle the magic ball, find the courage to jump into a giant ball pit, and pretend to be hopping kangaroos. End the day with a fun dance party where everyone shakes their bums!

programme.title: E1 - So Many Fun Things to Discover!
programme.desc: There are so many fun things to discover with Mia, Max & their friends! First, they head to the park for some rolling fun as they play Jack & Jill, rolling down the muddy grass & whizzing down the slide! Then, Max gets his first sippy cup & is so excited to show it off that he starts an impromptu tea party with all his playmates. The day of discovery ends with a rainy day competition to see who can make the biggest puddle splash of all!

programme.title: E18 - JJ's Animal Friends & Counting!
programme.desc: Join JJ for fun with animal friends & counting! JJ has to find five little ducks that ran away from their bath! Then, Bear helps JJ search nature to find his missing teddy bear. The animal fun continues as JJ plays hide-and-seek with shark toys, counts baby ducklings at the park & watches ten little dinosaur eggs hatch! Plus, act out the story of the 'Three Little Pigs' & sing along to 'Little Miss Muffet'!

programme.title: E1 - A Super Fun Day on the Farm!
programme.desc: Join Ella for a super fun day at Lellobee City Farm! First, when a nest of baby duck eggs starts to hatch, Ella has to play 'Mummy Duck' to keep all the cute but runaway ducklings together! Then, Rishi organizes all the animals for a friendly game of soccer, where everyone learns each other's animal sounds. The fun day ends with a new arrival, as Ella & Mei find & adopt a stray cat named Bingo, welcoming him to his new home!

programme.title: E11 - Baby John’s Football Skills
programme.desc: Join Baby John as he learns how to play soccer! With help from his family, he practices his skills and learns that sharing the ball with friends makes the game even more fun. Get ready to move your body and score the winning goal!

programme.title: E6 - The Ultimate Football Warm-Up Dance
programme.desc: Warm up for the ultimate football match with a high-energy dance party! Groove to 'Head, Shoulders, Knees, and Toes,' play the Freeze Dance game, and learn that determination can help you win any race. Get ready to move and have fun!

programme.title: E1 - A Big Day of Rescues & Learning!
programme.desc: Join Digley, Dazey & the crew for a big day of rescues & learning! When the barn at Old MacDonald's Farm catches fire, the crew uses quick thinking to extinguish the flames. Then, a trip to the mountains goes wrong when an avalanche traps them in a tunnel, & they must find a clever way to escape! The rescues continue as Digley faces his fear of heights to restore a broken clock & the friends work together to save Scout after she falls down a hole during a thunderstorm.

programme.title: E2 - Pitch Perfect Playtime Party
programme.desc: Come to a playtime party with Mia and her friends! Roll and bounce with Twinkle the magic ball, find the courage to jump into a giant ball pit, and pretend to be hopping kangaroos. End the day with a fun dance party where everyone shakes their bums!

programme.title: E5 - Baby Star
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E2 - Pitch Perfect Playtime Party
programme.desc: Come to a playtime party with Mia and her friends! Roll and bounce with Twinkle the magic ball, find the courage to jump into a giant ball pit, and pretend to be hopping kangaroos. End the day with a fun dance party where everyone shakes their bums!

programme.title: E1 - Mom's Crazy Inventions Go Haywire!
programme.desc: Mom's crazy inventions are going haywire! First, Arpo & Daniel have fun with the new voice-controlled smart house, until it starts having a tantrum & they have to figure out how to calm it down. Then, Mom's new time travel machine accidentally turns a pigeon into a giant pterodactyl, forcing Arpo to catch it! The mayhem continues when Daniel takes a flying smartcrib on a joyride & Arpo has to chase a remote-controlled truck that's gone out of control!

programme.title: E4 - Baby John's Family Are His Heroes!
programme.desc: Baby John thinks his family members are the best heroes! He really loves & admires his dad, & wants to copy everything he does to be just like him. His big brother Jack is a hero, too, & is always willing to help his little brother & teach him new things. After Mom's cupcakes go missing, Baby John dresses up as a police officer to find out who took them, interviewing each of his family member heroes!

programme.title: E1 - A Big Day of Rescues & Learning!
programme.desc: Join Digley, Dazey & the crew for a big day of rescues & learning! When the barn at Old MacDonald's Farm catches fire, the crew uses quick thinking to extinguish the flames. Then, a trip to the mountains goes wrong when an avalanche traps them in a tunnel, & they must find a clever way to escape! The rescues continue as Digley faces his fear of heights to restore a broken clock & the friends work together to save Scout after she falls down a hole during a thunderstorm.

programme.title: E3 - A Big Ocean Clean Up Day!
programme.desc: Join the Shark Family as they work hard to keep the sea clean! It's a busy day with so much rubbish on the seabed. Stanley Shark becomes his heroic alter-ego, Super Shark, to show everyone how to clean up & recycle properly! The Sharksons show their creativity by using recycled materials to build an amazing underwater ball pit & slide. Plus, see them use teamwork to operate little digger trucks & even fix a broken bus wheel using a sunken bin lid!

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 一部以專門經營鬼客人的的士為題材的電視劇。以實現鬼神們最後願望的的士司機為中心，敘述多種多樣的故事。

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 有著「洪吉童」封號的女義賊洪恩祖（南志鉉 飾）專偷貪官的財富，為百姓謀取福祉，怎料在她受到道月大君李烈（文相敏 飾）追捕時，兩人竟然意外互換靈魂！在互換靈魂的期間，兩人拋開成見重新認識彼此，一起攜手守護百姓，最終收穫珍貴的愛情。

programme.title: E30
programme.desc: 無論過去、現在、未來，每個別具意義的相遇都造就華麗的日子，且無論什麼人都曾經擁有過華麗的日子。事業、愛情兩得意的能力者李志赫遇上責任感強陽光開朗的咖啡廳經理兼室內設計師池恩悟。兩人儘管外表看似光鮮亮麗，但在經歷人生的低潮後仍守在對方身邊，克服各種試驗，找到人生的真諦。

programme.title: Fury
programme.desc: Chick, Chi-to and Lucky are blood brothers. Chi-to's cousin, Chan, acts as a go-between and arranges a trafficking of counterfeit U.S. notes between Chi-to's group and the local triad society in Taiwan. However, Chan is a double-cross by informing the police of the trafficking. At the ambush, police injure Lucky and arrest him, while the rest have a narrow escape and land on a boat back to Hong Kong. On their return, Chan deliberately kills Lucky's wife Ngao and shots Chick into the sea. Lucky is free from jail and returns to Hong Kong five years later. Touchingly reunited with Chi-to, Lucky is told that Chick was dead and Ngao was disappeared during their run away. Meantime, Chan assigns his mistress Elsa to keep an eye on Lucky...

programme.title: Game Of Death
programme.desc: When Billy refuses to be intimidated by henchman Steiner, Dr. Land orders his assassination to serve as an example to others. Stick sneaks onto the set of Billy's new film....

programme.title: The Island
programme.desc: The story takes place on a deserted island. The only residence on the island is a family in which the mother ruled over three of her sons: Tai Fat, gloomy and sullen; Yee Fat, vulgar and cruel; Sam Fat, slightly retarded. Mother's earnest wish is to find a wife for Sam Fat to continue the family tree. Teacher Cheung, along with six of his students arrive on the island for camping. They first meet Yee Fat who brings them to the grocery for a rest. Yee Fat is delighted with the presence of the 3 young girls while Sam Fat falls in love at first sight with the charming girl Phyllis. He expresses his feelings to Tai Fat who has sworn to his mother that he will fulfill her wish to find his youngest brother a wife. He proposes to Cheung that Phyllis be married to Sam Fat. Cheung first thinks that it's a joke, but soon senses that Tai Fat is serious and that all three brothers are actually psychologically imbalanced...

programme.title: Fury
programme.desc: Chick, Chi-to and Lucky are blood brothers. Chi-to's cousin, Chan, acts as a go-between and arranges a trafficking of counterfeit U.S. notes between Chi-to's group and the local triad society in Taiwan. However, Chan is a double-cross by informing the police of the trafficking. At the ambush, police injure Lucky and arrest him, while the rest have a narrow escape and land on a boat back to Hong Kong. On their return, Chan deliberately kills Lucky's wife Ngao and shots Chick into the sea. Lucky is free from jail and returns to Hong Kong five years later. Touchingly reunited with Chi-to, Lucky is told that Chick was dead and Ngao was disappeared during their run away. Meantime, Chan assigns his mistress Elsa to keep an eye on Lucky...

programme.title: Game Of Death
programme.desc: When Billy refuses to be intimidated by henchman Steiner, Dr. Land orders his assassination to serve as an example to others. Stick sneaks onto the set of Billy's new film....

programme.title: Inner Senses
programme.desc: Yan always sees dead people. Jim, her psychologist, thinks it's all in her mind brought by loneliness and by unpleasant experiences of past relationships. He devotes all his time to curing her. Jim soon falls in love as Yan is freed of her vision. But then he starts seeing dead people too. Jim remembers his past. His girlfriend in high school, named Yu, committed suicide when Jim tried to break up with her in twenty years ago. Now, with Yan's help and love, can Jim face up to the ghost and end the nightmare?

programme.title: E119 - The Crew Builds A Giant Lemonade Stand / The Crew Builds A Wildlife Bridge
programme.desc: After the Crew builds a special lemonade stand for Lucas and Lily, a sour Speed Meister sends it rolling through Builder Cove! // Why does Crunchy the beaver cross the road? Because Rubble & Crew build a bridge to help him get to the other side!

programme.title: E209 - Times Machine / Super Tim / Uncle Tiberius
programme.desc: Tim and Tia build a time machine to avoid telling Dad the truth. // Tim goes to DinoStar's training academy, but is confused by his hero's training methods. // Uncle Tiberius comes to visit the Rexes, and Tim must be on his best behaviour.

programme.title: E616 - Special Mission Blaze
programme.desc: When a nefarious villain steals every toothbrush in Axle City, Blaze's only chance at saving the day is to become: Special Mission Blaze!

programme.title: E224 - The Puppet / Gloop Gloop Ah-Ah
programme.desc: The Barbababies decide to create a show and go all out! // Barbotine wants to create the best lemonade.

programme.title: E106 - Pretend Friend / Croc Outta Water
programme.desc: When Winston won't play with Lydia, Daisy and Mr. Crocodile create an imaginary friend for her. // Mr. Crocodile helps Daisy fish-sit for Martin, but worries he won't be able to stop himself from eating it.

programme.title: E910 - The Clean Machine
programme.desc: When three of Blaze's friends end up in messy trouble, Blaze must save them by turning into the soapiest, sudsiest cleaning machine of all time: Clean Machine Blaze!

programme.title: E117 - The Lost Capybara Kids / The Case Of The Curious Keas
programme.desc: Two capybaras can't be found after a game of hide-and-seek in the wetlands. // Sam and Kit try to figure out who's playing tricks on them in the snow.

programme.title: E915 - Pups Save A Playful Elephant Calf
programme.desc: When Everest joins the Paw Patrol for a visit to the jungle, she makes friends with a clumsy elephant calf and then must help rescue him.

programme.title: E115 - The Fuchsia Ocean / Zero Waste
programme.desc: Chemical sprays are making the countryside rosy! The Barbapapas' build an aviary to protect sick birds. // When they see a beach covered with rubbish, the Barbapapa family decides to clean the beach and use the trash to make a miniature golf course.

programme.title: E912 - Breakfast Bots
programme.desc: Can Robot Blaze stop the Breakfast Bots before they bury Axle City in breakfast?

programme.title: E106 - Pretend Friend / Croc Outta Water
programme.desc: When Winston won't play with Lydia, Daisy and Mr. Crocodile create an imaginary friend for her. // Mr. Crocodile helps Daisy fish-sit for Martin, but worries he won't be able to stop himself from eating it.

programme.desc: After the Crew builds a special lemonade stand for Lucas and Lily, a sour Speed Meister sends it rolling through Builder Cove! // Why does Crunchy the beaver cross the road? Because Rubble & Crew build a bridge to help him get to the other side!

programme.title: Why Oil Won't Get Cheaper. The US-Iran Deal And The Price Of Everything
programme.desc: The dust is settling after a new US-Iran deal - but one question still matters: when will oil prices feel normal again? Since the war began in late February, markets have been on a rollercoaster. And even with an agreement in place, the damage isn't just political-it's physical.

programme.title: The Current Affairs Documentary
programme.desc: It's World Cup season in Mexico - yet the spectacle can't hide a dark reality in the country. Over 100,000 people are still listed missing. It's believed many of them have been murdered.

programme.title: From Popstar To Sanitation Advocate In Rural Ghana
programme.desc: Ghanaian singer Wiyaala returns home to the village of Funsi, using her fame to improve sanitation and bring better health to her community. Also: An artist in Mali is painting public buses to spread awareness about the climate crisis.

programme.title: Nikola Tesla - Waves Of The Future
programme.desc: Nikola Tesla, born in 1856 in what is now Croatia, was one of the world's greatest inventors. He developed numerous innovations in the field of electrical engineering and was granted over 280 patents, many of them in the USA.

programme.title: E161
programme.desc: 'World Insight With Shih' is a weekly special program with in-depth political and economic commentary. The program consists of three segments: 'Viewing the World with Shih', 'Discussing the Past and Present' and 'Speaking New Words'. The senior commentator Shih Chi Ping analyzes the world's political and economic topics from a unique point of view, and deeply analyzes the global trends to audience.

programme.desc: It's one hour until the opening bell in Europe and Squawk Box Europe has everything you need to prepare for the first trade. programme.title: US Squawk Box
programme.desc: “Squawk Box” is the ultimate pre-market morning news and talk program, where the biggest names in business and politics tell their most important stories. Anchored by Joe Kernen, Becky Quick and Andrew Ross Sorkin, the show brings Wall Street to Main Street. It's a must-see for everyone from the professional trader to the casual investor.

E81 - Sens (1)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament visits Sens, meeting local residents at the market. Today, she focuses on the city's history and museum.

programme.title: E81 - Sens (1)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament visits Sens, meeting local residents at the market. Today, she focuses on the city's history and museum.

programme.title: E2 - Saint-Ouen/Patrick Jouin/Tati/Dingue De Lunettes/Officer's Jacket
programme.desc: A stroll through the Saint-Ouen flea market. A visit to the workshop of Patrick Jouin, where the interior designer presents his creative process. How the Tati bag inspired the world of fashion. At Dingue de Lunettes, Dan Alcabes gives new life to vintage frames. The officer's jacket conquers the runways.

programme.title: E14 - Rigatoni With Mushrooms And Pan-Seared Salmon
programme.desc: Two recipes on the menu: rigatoni with mushrooms and almonds, and pan-seared salmon with ginger and maple sauce.

programme.title: E9 - Beacon Of The Pyrenees
programme.desc: The Pic du Midi scientific observatory has proudly dominated the Pyrenees, 2,877 metres above sea-level, for one hundred and forty years. Notably specialising in the study of the sun's corona, the site is today open to the public, offering a fabulous panorama and unique experience to all who visit.

programme.title: E6 - Bernissart
programme.desc: We take a walk in Bernissart, in the heart of a region shaped by coal mining. The miners' work revealed an unsuspected discovery here: the Bernissart Iguanodons, illustrious witnesses of the Cretaceous period. The Iguanodon Museum is dedicated to them.

programme.title: E6 - Snow And Ice
programme.desc: Things take a turn for the worse. During a training weekend, both expedition teams discover the mountains' turbulent side and, above all, must say goodbye to a dear friend.

programme.title: E134
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: Jang Youngsil: The Greatest Scientist Of Joseon
programme.desc: The drama is the first 'historic science' drama that has been produced in Korea. This drama depicts the successful life story of the scientist Jang Youngsil that contributed to the development and accomplishment of Joseon's science during the 15th century. In particular, the drama emphasizes his accomplishment through showing the restrictions and difficulties he experienced due to his social class as a slave. Moreover, the drama aims to depict Jang Youngsil as the role model of 'Korea's youth of the 21st century' through displaying his scientific accomplishments. The drama also expects to stimulate scientific curiosity amongst audiences and help them easily understand the fundamental principles of science by utilizing various data and scientific videos.

programme.title: Our Happy Days
programme.desc: A chaotic, high-stakes family saga where a seemingly perfect man and an endearingly flawed woman collide while every generation fights to become the main character of their own life.

programme.title: E37 - Like Ducks To Water
programme.desc: Wendy and Thelma are spending the summer holidays at their grandfather's house in the heart of nature. As city dwellers, they're worried about getting bored. But this summer, the two sisters discover that their grandfather's estate is more than just a park: it is home to chimeras, amazing creatures with magical powers.

programme.title: E14
programme.desc: 朱韻剛開始大學生活，就被“壞小子”李峋的闖入徹底顛覆了世界。被朱韻當成不學無術富家子的他，真實身份竟是學校破格錄取的特招生，難得一見的編程天才。兩人在幾次交鋒後，對彼此都有些賞識。學長方志靖對朱韻多次刁難，李峋出手維護朱韻，還邀她加入了自己組建的備賽隊伍，代表學校贏得了重大編程比賽。在相處中，兩人情感日益升溫

programme.title: E30
programme.desc: 《超時空羅曼史》講述了民國功夫巨星向秦羽，因一場意外來到21世紀，與十八線編劇金阿銀相遇，兩人展開了奇妙浪漫又充滿戲劇性的愛情故事。

programme.title: E14

programme.title: E30
programme.desc: 《超時空羅曼史》講述了民國功夫巨星向秦羽，因一場意外來到21世紀，與十八線編劇金阿銀相遇，兩人展開了奇妙浪漫又充滿戲劇性的愛情故事。

programme.title: E19
programme.desc: 故事講述了周筱風（趙又廷 飾）、方筱然（毛曉彤 飾）和林逸（金世佳 飾）三位心臟科醫生機緣巧合下，在東立醫院心臟中心相遇。三人因專業背景、職業理念不同而產生摩擦碰撞，隨後在治病救人的過程中逐漸磨合達成默契，最終在生命戰場並肩作戰的故事。

programme.title: E18
programme.desc: 年輕狀元郎陸江來上任淳寧縣令後屢破奇案，卻因捲入一樁殺妻舊案，從官場新星淪落至絕境。瀕死之際，幸得茶王之女榮善寶搭救。兩人聯手整頓家族、開拓茶道，在茶園裡締結了一段愛情佳話。

programme.title: E15
programme.desc: 朱韻剛開始大學生活，就被“壞小子”李峋的闖入徹底顛覆了世界。被朱韻當成不學無術富家子的他，真實身份竟是學校破格錄取的特招生，難得一見的編程天才。兩人在幾次交鋒後，對彼此都有些賞識。學長方志靖對朱韻多次刁難，李峋出手維護朱韻，還邀她加入了自己組建的備賽隊伍，代表學校贏得了重大編程比賽。在相處中，兩人情感日益升溫

programme.title: E30
programme.desc: 《超時空羅曼史》講述了民國功夫巨星向秦羽，因一場意外來到21世紀，與十八線編劇金阿銀相遇，兩人展開了奇妙浪漫又充滿戲劇性的愛情故事。

programme.title: E19
programme.desc: 故事講述了周筱風（趙又廷 飾）、方筱然（毛曉彤 飾）和林逸（金世佳 飾）三位心臟科醫生機緣巧合下，在東立醫院心臟中心相遇。三人因專業背景、職業理念不同而產生摩擦碰撞，隨後在治病救人的過程中逐漸磨合達成默契，最終在生命戰場並肩作戰的故事。

The Beast Stalker
programme.desc: A traffic accident changed their lives forever. In capturing wanted criminal Zhang Yidong, Sergeant Tang Fei was involved in a gunfight and car accident that put the criminal in a coma. But in the process he also crippled an fellow officer, and mistakenly shot dead the elder daughter of public prosecutor and single mother Gao Min. Unable to handle the guilt, Tang Fei succumbs to a fog of pain. Gao Min, meanwhile, pours all her love and attention to her younger daughter Ling. Three months later, the criminal Zhang Yidong awakens from his coma. Gao Min, who had been working hard on bringing him to justice, insists he stand trial immediately.
